reference: At three am, I woke up with severe shaking of my whole body and chills. It went on for thirty minutes. Then I took a pain and sleep medication, and within fifteen minutes it went away. This morning, I had a very slight recurrence. I fell and hit my head about two months ago, and they took me to the emergency room by ambulance. A computed tomography scan showed nothing. I felt like I was going to have a seizure or something. Please help.
text: At 3 a.m., I woke up with severe faking of my whole body and chills. I went on for 15 minutes. Then I took a pain and sick medication, and within 15 minutes of my life. The same day, I had a very severe recurrence. I put them in my head about two months ago, and they took me to the emergency room by ambulance. The computer tomography scan showed nothing. I felt like I was going to have a seizure or something. Please help.
